title: Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies:
Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies!
